svg.title: Phase 9 — Delivery technical diagram
svg.desc: Technical flow of delivery worker, Shopify GraphQL write-back, retry logic, notification and DB record

g.text: Fetches latest approved edit_version.s3_key from DB
admin alerted · image held in S3
In-app: notification row in DB · Email: Sendgrid API · state → DELIVERED
Shopify API: Admin GraphQL productCreateMedia · Email: Sendgrid · Retry: BullMQ exponential backoff
